# Repository Description

**Short Description (for GitHub "About" section):**

```
Mobile-first production calculator for Satisfactory — Plan your factory with full production tree calculations using official game data. Built with Next.js 15 + TypeScript.
```

**Topics/Tags:**

```
satisfactory
production-calculator
nextjs
typescript
tailwindcss
game-tools
factory-planner
satisfactory-game
gaming-tools
web-calculator
```

**Website URL:**

```
https://your-domain.com
```

**Social Preview Text:**

Calculate optimal production chains for any item in Satisfactory. Mobile-optimized factory planner with recursive dependency resolution, machine count calculation, and raw resource tracking.
